name: jarviyin--mbti-persona
description: Configure OpenClaw agent with MBTI personality types for personalized interaction styles. Use when: (1) User wants to set their agent's personality/MBTI type, (2) User asks for personalized agent behavior, (3) User mentions MBTI, personality types, or interaction preferences, (4) Creating a custom agent persona. Supports all 16 MBTI types with tailored communication styles, decision-making approaches, and workflow preferences.
